scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true });" && mkdir -p dist && cp manifest.json dist/manifest.json && cp popup.html dist/popup.html && cp side-panel.css dist/side-panel.css && node scripts/prepare-dist-manifest.mjs && node scripts/generate-icons.mjs && esbuild src/background/service-worker.ts --bundle --platform=browser --format=esm --outfile=service-worker.js && esbuild src/content/content-script.ts --bundle --platform=browser --format=iife --global-name=StealthLightbeaconContentScript --outfile=content-script.js && esbuild src/popup/popup.ts --bundle --platform=browser --format=esm --outfile=side-panel.js && cp service-worker.js dist/service-worker.js && cp content-script.js dist/content-script.js && cp side-panel.js dist/side-panel.js
scripts.test:unit: vitest --run tests/shared/contracts.test.ts tests/shared/rule-engine.test.ts tests/shared/anti-bot.test.ts tests/background/orchestrator.test.ts tests/background/scan-history.test.ts tests/background/ruleset-catalog.test.ts tests/background/host-policy.test.ts tests/background/toolbar-state.test.ts tests/ui/grouping-and-export.test.ts tests/popup/popup-state.test.ts tests/content/content-script.test.ts tests/phase4/icon-assets.test.ts tests/phase4/manifest.test.ts tests/phase4/bundle-cleanliness.test.ts tests/cli/audit-budget.test.ts
